response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics and vocals perfectly matched the Japanese lyrics of Gunjou (群青) by YOASOBI, presented under the cover name '碧青' in the 3D live.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided reference lyrics for accurate Japanese transcription and English translation, discarding unused lyrics beyond the video's end. Prominent narrative-driven on-screen text in the intro (the silent segment) was translated to maintain the emotional storyline.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the silent visual text to its on-screen duration, followed by tightly synchronized, audio-anchored subtitles for the musical performance. Applied precise transitions to match the fast vocal phrasing of Gunjou.

subtitles.original: 3周年ありがとう！これからもずっと君と一緒に！
subtitles.english: [Text: Thank you for the 3rd anniversary! I want to be with you forever!]
[Text: I will join Hololive!!]
[Text: Rejected]
[Song: Gunjou / Lyrics & Composition: Ayase]
Ah, just like usual,

subtitles.original: 過ぎる日々にあくびが出る
subtitles.english: I yawn at the passing days.

subtitles.original: さんざめく夜、越え、今日も
subtitles.english: Crossing a noisy night, today again,
morning falls upon the city of Shibuya.
Feeling somewhat empty,
that kind of feeling...
How boring.
But that is fine,
that's just how it is.
This is fine.

subtitles.original: 知らず知らず隠してた
subtitles.english: Inadvertently hiding away

subtitles.original: 本当の声を響かせてよ、ほら
subtitles.english: my true voice, let it resonate, look!

subtitles.original: 見ないフリしていても
subtitles.english: Even if you pretend not to see,
it is certainly right there.
Drawing just as I feel,

subtitles.original: 自分で選んだその色で
subtitles.english: with the colors I chose myself.
In the morning wearing a drowsy atmosphere,
a blue world visited me.

subtitles.original: 好きなものを好きだと言う
subtitles.english: Saying that I like what I love...
I can't help but be terrified,

subtitles.original: 本当の自分、出会えた気がしたんだ
subtitles.english: but I felt like I could finally meet my true self.

subtitles.original: あぁ、手を伸ばせば伸ばすほどに
subtitles.english: Ah, the more I reach my hands out,
the further away it goes.

subtitles.original: 思うようにいかない今日も
subtitles.english: Even today, when things don't go as planned,

subtitles.original: また慌ただしくもがいてる
subtitles.english: I am struggling, flustered once again.
Even this frustrating feeling,

subtitles.original: ただ情けなくて涙が出る
subtitles.english: it's just so pathetic that it brings tears to my eyes.
The further I step in,
the harder it gets,
and the more painful it becomes.
Moving forward just as I feel,

subtitles.original: 自分で選んだこの道を
subtitles.english: on this path I chose myself.
On the night of rubbing my heavy eyelids,

subtitles.original: しがみついた青い誓い
subtitles.english: I clung onto my blue vow.

subtitles.original: 好きなことを続けること
subtitles.english: To keep doing what I love...

subtitles.original: それは楽しいだけじゃない
subtitles.english: it is not just fun all the time.
Can I really do this?
I get so anxious, but...
Ah, no matter how many times,
look, no matter how many times...
